title: cristaria coccinea
intro: Cristaria coccinea, also known as the Red Lotus or Chinese Lotus, is a species of flowering plant in the Nelumbo genus, known for its distinctive red flowers and aquatic growth. The medicinal properties of Cristaria coccinea include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. Cristaria coccinea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
